items.title: W.R. Berkley Q4 Earnings Miss Estimate, Revenues Up Y/Y
items.description: W.R. Berkley posted solid full-year growth as higher premiums and record investment income offset a Q4 earnings miss and elevated expenses.

items.title: Greg Abel Signals Shift as Berkshire Weighs Kraft Heinz Exit?
items.description: BRK.B may exit its Kraft Heinz stake in Greg Abel's first major move, signaling a shift from Buffett's legacy.

items.title: Brown & Brown Q4 Earnings Top Estimates on Strong Investment Income
items.description: BRO's Q4 results reflect higher commission and fees, improved investment income, and higher adjusted EBITDAC, offset by lower organic revenues.

items.title: Citigroup Maintains Sell on Travelers Companies, Raises Price Target to $315
items.description: Citigroup  analyst Michael Ward   maintains Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) with a Sell and raises the price target from $291 to $315.
